mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_user u WHERE u.acc_yn = 'Y'
AND (u.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT tg.idx AS groupId, tg.name AS groupName, tg.up_idx AS parentId, tg.degree AS sortOrder FROM pi_target_group tg WHERE 1=1
AND tg.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY tg.degree ASC, tg.name ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets t
LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y'
WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets t WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.group_idx IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg2.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN CTE ON tg2.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
SELECT s.idx AS policyId, s.name AS policyName, s.detail_name AS policyDetail, s.status AS useYn FROM pi_setting s WHERE s.status = 'Y' ORDER BY s.seq ASC, s.idx ASC
SELECT d.idx AS networkId, d.dmz_ip AS networkIp, d.memo AS memo FROM pi_dmz d ORDER BY d.memo ASC
